one_liner: I care about code quality more than anything, and I push everyone around me to care too — across 3+ years of building with React, Vue, Svelte, and Laravel.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Designed the frontend architecture for a full Nuxt.js revamp — composables, UI patterns, and API abstractions adopted by the team without friction
Shipped Laravel backend features with zero reported bugs across all client deployments

experience.title: Software Engineer II
bullets: Migrated Telegram bot codebase from JavaScript to TypeScript and added automated Playwright tests, reducing production bug reports by over 80%
Built reusable component library in Svelte/SvelteKit for a full system revamp

experience.title: Junior PHP Developer
bullets: Built and maintained shipping integrations (J&T, NinjaVan) and marketplace integrations (Shopee, Lazada, Zalora) — core features that clients depended on daily
Designed a real-time sales dashboard for Facebook Live streams using webhooks and WebSockets, surfacing live order and revenue data during broadcasts

main.name: Bigcampus
bullets: Built a social platform where people meet through clubs and gatherings, designed around the idea that socializing should be as easy as possible
Engineered gathering lifecycle with state machines (Open > Lock-in > Room > Completed), including auto-cancellation, conflict windows, and real-time coordination via WebSockets
Deployed as a containerized PWA with native push notifications via service workers, running Laravel, Reverb, and scheduler in a single Docker container
